summary: TWO_COLUMN: SGD (batch=1), minibatch, full-batch compared on f=(w_1² + 3w_2²)/2 with decreasing gradient-noise scale. Axes with contours + 3 always_redraw trails (BLUE/GREEN/ORANGE) + 3 dots. ValueTracker t_tr reveals 80 iterations. RIGHT panel has live per-method loss + YELLOW minimum marker.
